headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on Builders FirstSource, Lowers Price Target to $91
summary: Keybanc  analyst Jeffrey D. Hammond   maintains Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $100 to $91.

headline: Black Bear Value Partners Q2 2026 - Top 5 Businesses We Own
summary: While housing activity remains near cyclical lows, we believe Builders FirstSource should be able to sustain this level of cash generation.
